reported_entities.name: Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd. (Foxconn Technology Group)
reported_entities.claim: 鴻海 refers to the Taiwanese multinational electronics manufacturer whose full legal name is Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd.; it operates internationally under the trade name Foxconn (Foxconn Technology Group), and domestically in Taiwan as 鴻海科技集團 / Hon Hai Technology Group. It is the world's largest contract electronics manufacturer, known for assembling Apple products.

reported_entities.name: Foxconn official corporate site
reported_entities.claim: Official corporate homepage confirms the English branding 'Hon Hai Technology Group' with the Foxconn trade name.

notes: Single WebSearch query ('鴻海 official English name Foxconn') was sufficient to resolve the cross-language identification with high confidence. Results consistently show 鴻海 (Chinese) = Hon Hai (legal/formal transliteration) = Foxconn (international trade name / brand). Full legal name: Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd.; group name in Taiwan: 鴻海科技集團 / Hon Hai Technology Group; overseas trade name: Foxconn / Foxconn Technology Group. No conflicting or ambiguous candidate entities appeared in results.
